title: SpeedBlocks
description: Adds 4 new blocks that can help with transportation of items/players/mobs
body:
This mod adds 4 new blocks to the game:
slow, medium and fast Speedblocks
and 1 Jump Block!
Speedblocks push players, mobs and items to the direction the arrow is pointing at, while Jump Block throws them up!
 
It can be really useful when you want to transport animals or when you want to transport items to hopper -> chest.
undefined
The blocks also change textures while something is touching them!
You can turn off that just by going to Mods -> SpeedBlocks -> Config (for Forge and NeoForge)
Or by editing config/speedblock/speedblock.json file (for Fabric)
 undefined
